creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178033
v0

At least one other downstream enabled OpenMP by default[1]. Not sure what fixed OPENMP=on build in our ports: GCC + libc++, bug 199601, bug 196712 or bug 215192.

[1] https://git.archlinux.org/svntogit/community.git/tree/trunk/PKGBUILD?h=packages/wesnoth
